notes:
- 'Grew this week' now shows the network's real weekly growth, same number for everyone.
- Lesson labels now say where each lesson came from at a glance: yours, community, or harvested from public sources.
- Your AI's tools got sharper: expanding a lesson always returns the full text, new lessons are stamped with the Fortnite version they were learned on, and the stats now count the thousands of verified API declarations served live from your project's digest.
- Faster, sturdier global stats serving behind the scenes.

history.notes:
- 'Grew this week' now shows the network's real weekly growth, same number for everyone.
- Lesson labels now say where each lesson came from at a glance: yours, community, or harvested from public sources.
- Your AI's tools got sharper: expanding a lesson always returns the full text, new lessons are stamped with the Fortnite version they were learned on, and the stats now count the thousands of verified API declarations served live from your project's digest.
- Faster, sturdier global stats serving behind the scenes.

- Tree updates land in ~30 minutes instead of 12 hours.
- When one of YOUR lessons graduates into everyone's tree you'll see it (and get a little toast) - plus the global tree numbers now come live from the network, same for every user.
- Your AI got two new powers: kb_verify checks a Verse plan against your project's real API before any code is written (catches would-not-compile calls), and kb_get expands any lesson to its full record.
- Smarter, leaner answers: inherited members show up (with where they come from), small classes list full typed signatures in one call, junk matches stopped flooding results, and exact answers no longer carry a false 'no confident match' warning.
- Sharing privacy got tighter: machine names, project names, and people's names are now scrubbed from outgoing lessons too.
- 40+ new audited lessons on the community feed (Epic samples, v41.00 release-note facts, Scene Graph patterns).

- The Knowledge Tree tab got a glow-up: the global brain everyone shares up top, YOUR tree / edge / wall / sent-up below, and a live Recent Lessons feed of what your tree is learning (plus a What's this? explainer).
- One-click AI connect now works for everyone: the app bundles its own Python and registers Claude Code directly - no terminal, no installs, no PATH luck.
- Smarter, more honest answers: inheritance-aware symbol lookups, natural phrasing finds real APIs, 'no confident match' notes only when true, leaner responses.
- The tree now knows player persistence inside-out (weak_map, persistable classes, save migration) - distilled from real shipped islands.
- Sharing flows instantly when on, never when off - your switch is absolute. Lessons, captures AND dropped Verse systems all feed the community wall (de-identified, always).
- Plus a pile of under-the-hood fixes from two full-scale stress-test campaigns.

- Connect your AI in ONE CLICK - Claude Desktop, Claude Code AND Codex, each with a live 'connected' tick.
- The Knowledge Tree now receives Epic-docs updates and community knowledge through a secure feed for licensed users.
- Smarter knowledge search results and small fixes.

- New Knowledge Tree tab: a built-in, always-current base of verified UEFN facts your AI can search - so it stops guessing.
- Teach it as you build: drag a working folder or .zip onto the wall, or leave auto-capture on to quietly collect lessons from your project notes.
- Epic's UEFN documentation now stays up to date automatically in the background.
- Plus the brand-new one-window interface and in-app updates, and a batch of stability fixes.

- A brand-new, faster interface - the whole app in one clean window.
- Updates now download and install in-app - no more manual downloads.
- Smoother performance, rounded window, and the same one-click project setup.
- Better UEFN project detection (2026 log format) + stability fixes.

- Fixed the 'Failed to load Python DLL' error box some people saw on launch or after updating. The app is now packaged as a folder instead of a single self-extracting exe, so Windows and antivirus stop tripping over the temporary unpack. No action needed - just update.

- The app now needs a one-time unlock key from the developer. Enter it once and this computer stays unlocked for good - updates and going offline won't ask again.
- Brand-new Theme Studio: recolour the whole app from a live mini preview. Click any card or button to edit it, drag colour / vibrance / brightness sliders, edit borders on their own, and watch it all update live before you commit.
- Built-in theme presets (Deep Ocean, Synthwave, Emerald City, Frostbyte and more) - one click to apply, then tweak to taste.
- Save your own presets and re-apply them anytime.
- Undo/redo while theming (Ctrl+Z / Ctrl+Y).
- ...and a ridiculous live-rainbow 'RGB' theme, because why not.
